strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and multiple languages
Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Strong testing discipline with TDD, pairing, and CI/CD practices from RIDE Capital
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Limited recent Kotlin/Java work; secondary stack exposure appears dated
Cloud platform depth (AWS/GCP/Azure) only briefly referenced via AWS CDK at Optilyz
response.justification: The candidate brings deep, broad full-stack experience well beyond the 6-year requirement, with directly relevant work on TypeScript/Node.js/React products and current hands-on involvement in AI-agent infrastructure including MCP tooling. Testing rigor, architecture exposure, and polyglot background align well with the role. The main gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js experience and relatively light recent depth in Kotlin/Java and cloud platforms beyond AWS CDK.
